prompt: me faz um material de estudo sobre Deadlocks pra SO — as 4 condições de Coffman, estratégias de tratamento, tudo isso. Quero com simulado no final

assertions.text: PDF file was generated and has more than 1 page
PDF mentions all 4 Coffman conditions (mutual exclusion, hold-and-wait, no preemption, circular wait)
PDF mentions Banker's Algorithm (Algoritmo do Banqueiro or Banker)
PDF covers at least 2 of: detection, prevention, avoidance
Simulado section has 4 or more questions
